## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.14.1

### Motion Notifications
- Keeps motion events firing even when recording pre-cache does not produce media.
- Adds cache status fields to motion event data so logs and automations can tell whether cached recording media was ready.
- Keeps the existing recording panel URL on the event when cached media is unavailable instead of dropping the event entirely.

### Debug Logging
- Updates the recording-cache debug message so failed or empty cache results are visible without making the motion event disappear.

### Validation
- Adds regression coverage for motion events that continue firing when recording cache returns no media.
